scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @crm-bot/db run build && concurrently -n web,bot -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @crm-bot/web run dev" "pnpm --filter @crm-bot/bot run dev"
scripts.dev:bot: pnpm --filter @crm-bot/db run build && pnpm --filter @crm-bot/bot run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @crm-bot/db run build && pnpm --filter @crm-bot/web run build && pnpm --filter @crm-bot/bot run build
